Sāvakasannipātaparicchedavaṇṇanā/Mahāvag.text: Paramatthamañjūsāyaṁ visuddhimaggasaṁvaṇṇanāyanti bhavitabbaṁ– “Sā esā paramatthānaṁ, tattha tattha yathārahaṁ. Nidhānato paramattha-mañjūsā nāma nāmato”ti– Visuddhi-Ṭī 2. 535 piṭṭhe Visuddhimaggamahāṭīkāya nigamane sayameva vuttattā.
Khu 7. 139, 278; Khu 8. 175; Khu 9. 376; Khu 10. 16 piṭṭhehi adhippāyamattameva gahitaṁ viya dissati.
